articles.title: 'It's against the rules!' - Mikel Arteta vents FURY at Champions League officials over 'completely unacceptable' Eberechi Eze penalty decision
articles.description: Mikel Arteta was left in a state of disbelief after witnessing what he termed a "completely unacceptable" refereeing U-turn during Arsenal's 1-1 Champions League semi-final draw with Atletico Madrid. The Gunners boss saw a potential match-winning penalty for Eberechi Eze scrapped by VAR, leaving the tie on a knife-edge heading into the second leg.
